final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for a Zhao Ling'er inspired character.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation aesthetic with Pixar-style direction — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 3x3 grid layout (9 panels total), each panel showing the character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include all 9 expression panels with the following content:
  Top-left: winking expression, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking expression, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile expression, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling expression, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral expression, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy expression, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed expression, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly expression, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn paper holes as the framing device for each panel, white paper background
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, playful atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, varied direction across the 9 outfits — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: needs soft 3D rendered surfaces — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all 9 panels with their specific expressions, actions, and outfit colors; must maintain the "peeking through torn paper" framing concept across all panels
Avoid:
